description: Workspace template registry. Each entry is a full Data Model seed (api-registry + data-source + sandbox-environment + dashboard) that resolves through the existing growthub starter init --seed-config path. Adding a template = drop a seed file + add a row here. No CLI code edits.

templates.name: Project Management Workspace Template
templates.description: Opinionated workspace template for API-backed project task workflows. Built from the blank workspace starter with a sanitized project-management seed.
